'''gazhushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibschite|hibschite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibschite|hibschite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gazhushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzhishith|gæzhishith]] || [[word:gæzhishij|gæzhishij]] || [[word:gæzhishish|gæzhishish]] || [[word:gæzhishi|gæzhishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazhuzhushuth|gazhuzhushuth]] || [[word:gazhuzhushuj|gazhuzhushuj]] || [[word:gazhuzhushush|gazhuzhushush]] || [[word:gazhuzhushu|gazhuzhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazhushuth|gazhushuth]] || [[word:gazhushuj|gazhushuj]] || [[word:gazhushush|gazhushush]] || [[word:gazhushu|gazhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazhufshuth|gazhufshuth]] || [[word:gazhufshuj|gazhufshuj]] || [[word:gazhufshush|gazhufshush]] || [[word:gazhufshuf|gazhufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazhushuthu|gazhushuthu]] || [[word:gazhushuju|gazhushuju]] || [[word:gazhushushu|gazhushushu]] || [[word:gazhushuku|gazhushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazhushuth|gazhushuth]] || [[word:gazhushuj|gazhushuj]] || [[word:gazhushush|gazhushush]] || [[word:gazhushu|gazhushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazhushuthul|gazhushuthul]] || [[word:gazhushujul|gazhushujul]] || [[word:gazhushushul|gazhushushul]] || [[word:gazhushukul|gazhushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazhushuthuthu|gazhushuthuthu]] || [[word:gazhushujuju|gazhushujuju]] || [[word:gazhushushushu|gazhushushushu]] || [[word:gazhushuku|gazhushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazhushuthun|gazhushuthun]] || [[word:gazhushujun|gazhushujun]] || [[word:gazhushushun|gazhushushun]] || [[word:gazhushukun|gazhushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazhushuthuoro|gazhushuthuoro]] || [[word:gazhushujuoro|gazhushujuoro]] || [[word:gazhushushuoro|gazhushushuoro]] || [[word:gazhushukuoro|gazhushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
